channel.title: transformers on Luke Salamone's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in transformers on Luke Salamone's Blog

item.title: What Are Attention Masks?
item.description: TLDR: Attention masks allow us to send a batch into the transformer even when the examples in the batch have varying lengths. If you want to perform inference with transformers one sequene at a time, you can ignore attention masks. The “slow way” will be sufficient for your needs. The slow way We can perform inference with GPT-2 using sequences one at a time, but it’s slow: from transformers import GPT2LMHeadModel, GPT2Tokenizer tokenizer = GPT2Tokenizer.
